originalTitle: My plumber charged $160 to fix the cistern on my toilet — but created another problem. Do I pay again?
summary: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”
content: “The cistern on my toilet has been constantly refilling and making a hissing noise.”
chineseTitle: 我的水管工花了 160 美元修理我马桶上的水箱，但却造成了另一个问题。我再付钱吗？
chineseSummary: “我马桶上的水箱一直在注水，并发出嘶嘶声。”
chineseContent: “我马桶上的水箱一直在注水，并发出嘶嘶声。”
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
